gap_findings.description: Russia makes no commitment on loss and damage in its NDCs.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: loss and damage is unavoidable even with adaptation; finance mechanisms urgently needed.

details.summary: Russia's NDCs lack any commitment on loss and damage, and its conditional dependency on international finance creates delivery risk.
